name: Adventurous Slime
short_description: A mini metroidvania game about a small but very courageous slime going on an adventure, featuring colorful pixelated visuals and chiptune songs.
detailed_description:
Have you ever dreamed in being a small slime exploring and adventuring through a magical world? Well, your time has come! 

Adventurous Slime is a mini metroidvania about a small but very courageous slime going on an adventure. Featuring a magical world full of dangerous creatures and powerful ancient items to find, colorful pixelated visuals and chiptune songs.

Somebody freed Lord Old Skull and now the little witches are afraid and need a very powerful hero to protect the world! But our slimes don't know any big hero, so they decide to go stop this evil creature by themselves! Why? Well, because they are adventurous slimes!

To finish and/or complete this game it'll probably take around 2/3 hours in most cases, but if you are an experienced metroidvania player, it's possible to finish it in around 1 hour. Also using a controller is highly recommended to playing this game. 

FEATURES

  • Visit 4 different biomes;

  • 4 bosses to face;

  • 3 Difficulty levels (can be changed at any time);

  • Customize your slime;

  • Colorful 8-bit style graphics;

  • Vibrant Chiptune style music;

  • Many different Items to collect;

  • Simplified experience level system;

  • Alternative paths.
